I cound not install eruby with your patch. 

install  -o root -g wheel -m 444 /data/image/usr/ports/current/eruby/work/eruby-1.0.5/eruby.html /usr/local/share/doc/ruby18/eruby/ 
install: /data/image/usr/ports/current/eruby/work/eruby-1.0.5/eruby.html: No such file or directory 
*** Error code 71 

Please test, I commited some fixed to build eruby with ruby-1.8.7.160_3,1 
The problem is that the thread options are no longer in Config::CONFIG
